zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fincheden於大約1330年出生在英國越可爾武德頌 李斯時，她的父親Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden31歲，母親Lady Alice de Gildersome31歲。她於大約1335年與Sir John I Kaye在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1379年之後在她的家鄉。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fincheden was born about 1330, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, her father, Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden, was 31 and her mother, Lady Alice de Gildersome, was 31. She married Sir John I Kaye about 1335, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died after 1379, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fincheden est née environ 1330, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Gildersome, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John I Kaye environ 1335, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée après 1379, dans sa ville natale.

Sie hat um 1335 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John I Kaye geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1379 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fincheden è nata il circa 1330 nel Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice de Gildersome, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John I Kaye circa 1335, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 1379, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Finchedenが約1330年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズで生まれた時，父Chevalier Sir William de Fynchedenは31歳，母Lady Alice de Gildersomeは31歳であった。約1335年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir John I Kayeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1379年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fincheden(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice de Gildersome(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 Sir John I Kaye(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fincheden родилась около 1330 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Chevalier Sir William de Fyncheden было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Gildersome, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John I Kaye около 1335 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла после 1379 г. в её родном городе.
